description.ko: 물질과 우주의 심연 사이의 경계가 영원한 침묵 속으로 흐려지는 VOID-3 이상 현상의 중심부로 떠나는 여정입니다.
description.en: A journey into the heart of the VOID-3 anomaly, where the boundaries between matter and the cosmic deep blur into an eternal silence.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of VOID-3, a monolithic space station suspended at the edge of a massive, swirling violet and black nebula, cosmic deep abyss, glowing crystalline structures, stars being pulled into a central singularity, hyper-realistic, 8k, ethereal lighting, dark sci-fi aesthetic.
